scripts.directus:setup: docker cp ./directus-schema.snapshot.yaml portfolio_directus:/directus/directus-schema.snapshot.yaml && docker exec portfolio_directus npx directus schema apply ./directus-schema.snapshot.yaml --yes
scripts.directus:snapshot: docker exec portfolio_directus sh -lc "npx directus schema snapshot /tmp/directus-schema.snapshot.yaml --yes" && docker cp portfolio_directus:/tmp/directus-schema.snapshot.yaml ./directus-schema.snapshot.yaml
